tour_step1_text: Create a Page Scout to monitor any URL for changes, or a Beat Scout to track a beat or location and discover under-reported stories. Each scout runs on a schedule and notifies you when it finds something new.
tour_step2_text: Every scout you create appears here. See its status — whether it found new results, matched your criteria, or is awaiting its first run. Run any scout on demand, or filter by location and topic.
tour_step3_text: Scouts extract atomic facts — called information units — from every source they find. Browse, filter, and search semantically across everything your scouts have collected.
tour_step4_text: Select units manually or let AI pick the most relevant ones. Then prepare an export for your CMS or download as Markdown.
tour_step5_text: Scrape any webpage, X account, or Instagram profile — no scout needed. Describe what data you want in plain language, and download the results as CSV.
upgrade_hint: Passez à Pro pour 750 crédits mensuels et débloquez un potentiel illimité.

transport_errorGeofence: This mode needs an area (preset or point + radius).
transport_errorWatchIds: Satellite scouts need at least one NORAD id.
transport_errorAircraftScope: Aircraft scouts need an area or at least one watch ID.
transport_errorLat: Enter a valid latitude between -90 and 90.

transport_errorWatchIdFormat: "{id}" isn't a valid ID for this mode.
transport_errorCredits: This schedule needs about {credits} credits/month — more than your balance.
